title: Battle of Pelek Baw
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Lorshan Pass]] |conc=[[Duel at Pelek Baw]] |next=[[Battle of Amaltanna/Legends|Battle of Amaltanna]] |image= |name=Battle of Pelek Baw |conflict=[[Summertime War]] |date=[[22 BBY/Legends|21.51 BBY]], 6 months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] |place=[[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]], [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] |result=*[[Balawai]] surrender to [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Upland Liberation Front]] disbanded |side1=Balawai |side2=*Upland Liberation Front *Galactic Republic |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Lorz Geptun]] (early in battle) *[[High Jedi General/Legends|High General]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] (late in battle) |commanders2=*[[Lor pelek]] [[Kar Vastor]] *High General [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] *High General Mace Windu (early in battle) |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*At least 24 [[Turbostorm-class gunship|''Turbostorm''-class gunships]] *At least 1 [[Ground assault vehicle/Legends|Ground Assault Vehicle]] *At least 2 mobile artillery pieces *[[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolaser]] emplacements *[[Ion cannon/Legends|Ion cannon]] emplacements *Militia *[[Armored groundcar]]s *At least 200 [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droids]] {{C|early in battle}} |forces2=*[[Akk Guard]]s *1 ''Turbostorm''-class gunship *10 [[Jadthu-class landing ship/Legends|''Jadthu''-class landing ships]] *510 [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] *At least 200 Vulture droids {{C|late in battle}} |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*At least 286 captured militia *At least 48 killed militia *At least dozens of civilian ships *Widespread damage to city *Capture of all Vultures |casual2=*All Akk Guards *At least 24 clones |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|We're going to ''take Pelek Baw?''''"
"''No. We are going to take the whole ''system''. All of it. Right now.|[[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]}} The '''Battle of Pelek Baw''' was a conflict between the [[Balawai]] militia of the [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] government, under the command of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Lorz Geptun]], and the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] [[Upland Liberation Front]], led by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]], and Korun ''[[lor pelek]]'' [[Kar Vastor]]. It was the final engagement of the [[Summertime War]]. ==The battle== The battle began with the capture of the [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] by a surprise assault of ten [[Jadthu-class landing ship/Legends|''Jadthu''-class landing ships]] with their [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] complements, masked by the arrival of a decoy [[Turbostorm-class gunship|''Turbostorm''-class gunship]] and by the gunships' position in a waterfall. 286 militia were captured (35 of them seriously wounded) and 48 were killed. As the [[Upland Liberation Front|ULF]] worked on accessing the [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droid]] control center at the spaceport, [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] went into the city to find [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Lorz Geptun]], the leader of the [[Balawai]] militia, and force his surrender. ==Betrayal== However, once he left, the ULF killed the clone trooper guard he had left behind, informed the others in the gunships that he had been killed, and using both their command of the clones and their control of the Vulture droids, began attacking the city, hoping to raze it to the ground and kill its populace. Windu was able to force a surrender from Geptun, and then using his militia, make his way back to the spaceport, returning in contact with the clones and disabling the droid command center. The clones under [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Nick Rostu]] killed the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] [[Akk Guard]]s while Windu dueled with and defeat ULF leaders [[Kar Vastor]] and [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]], placing them under arrest for trial on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The attack also enabled Geptun to call off the Vulture Droids, preventing them from destroying the city. Shortly later, a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] task force arrived in the system. The ULF was disbanded, the militia reduced in size with many of them joining the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Republic Army]], and [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] officially rejoined the Republic, ending the Summertime War. {{Battle-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de Pelek Baw }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Pelek Baw, battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Haruun Kal]] [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]]
